violations.text: The cold-water handle was observed in poor repair at the service line hand sink. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2026

The dumpster outside is located on grass. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026

Along the floor behind equipment in the kitchen area has an accumulation of soil residue, droppings, and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2026

The dumpsters outside are located on grass. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2025

The floor in the back left of kitchen area has an accumulation of soil residue, droppings, and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025

Handwashing soap and paper towels were observed at the 3 bay sink. PIC informed that hands can only be washed at a designated hand washing sink. PIC to remove hand washing aids. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025
Two freezers located in the kitchen area were not in good repair (not holding freezer temps). One is not in use while the other is holding at refrigerator temp. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the hood vent have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and/or other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the service area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025

The floors behind/under equipment and window ledges in the kitchen area has an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025

Observed dead mouse in trap behind refrigerator. Dead or trapped birds, insects, rodents, and other pests shall be removed from the premises at a frequency that presents their accumulation, decomposition or the attraction of pests. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2024
